name: Can I get free help for AI privilege issues in my San Antonio case?

mainEntity.name: Can I get free help for AI privilege issues in my San Antonio case?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, legal aid or bar pro bono for low-income; AI access initiatives in some states.[3] Key factors: income eligibility; civil vs. criminal; clinic availability.[3] Search state bar pro bono; use court self-help; qualify via survey tools.[3] AI improves access but verify.[3] Human review essential.
